title: ★ ★ 香港如果有分析Media Bias嘅網就好喇 ★ ★

replies.msg:
https://mediabiasfactcheck.com/south-china-morning-post/

較中立

呢種媒體冇乜偏見性，而且好少用啲偏袒嘅字眼（用有感染力嘅字眼去影響讀者／stereotypes）。啲報導可信得嚟，又有根有據。呢啲係最有信用嘅媒體。

可信度：高

Notes: Headquartered in Hong Kong, The South China Morning Post (also known as SCMP) is a Hong Kong newspaper focused on news, business, arts, tech and culture. The SCMP was founded by Tse Tsan-tai and British journalist Alfred Cunningham in 1903. On 5 April 2016 Alibaba Group acquired SCMP Group, including the South China Morning Post. SCMP.com is a subscription-only service and after being acquired by Alibaba Group, SCMP’s narrative became more pro-China, but still low in bias. However, when reporting local news The South China Morning Post publishes stories that are neutral in wording, while citing both sides equally. For example in this article the South China Morning Post covers both sides of the debate equally without interjecting opinions. When reporting U.S. news there is left leaning bias due to their viewpoint that correlates with U.S. left. Overall, we rate SCMP as factual in reporting, very slightly left leaning and least biased on a whole. (M. Huitsing 8/4/2017)

即係好似呢種網咁
個網咁啱有一個SCMP嘅分析
不過香港媒體淨係得SCMP喺個網度

仲有Snopes
不過被爆最近收左膠捐款
